allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Set up Blackhorn Wealth Management project scaffold

Next.js 14 \(App Router\) with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v3, Framer Motion,
Sanity CMS client, Lucide icons, and Resend. Includes custom dark/gold
color palette, Google Fonts \(Cormorant Garamond + DM Sans\), full folder
structure with placeholder pages and reusable UI components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add branding assets, favicons, OG image, and logo integration

- Generate logo variants: full \(dark/light\), horn mark \(dark/light\)
- Favicon set: 32px, 192px, 512px, apple-touch-icon on dark bg
- OG image: 1200x630 with horn mark + text on dark bg
- Navbar: horn mark image replaces placeholder "B", responsive sizing
- Footer: add Chinese characters \(晉羚財富管理\)
- Layout: full metadata with OG, Twitter, favicons, manifest
- PWA manifest with theme/background colors and icons
- Asset generation script \(scripts/generate-assets.mjs\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add i18n, service pages, legal pages, and performance/SEO fundamentals

- Set up next-intl with en/zh-hant locales and [locale] routing
- Add LanguageSwitcher component to Navbar \(desktop + mobile\)
- Create DisclaimerBanner with localStorage 30-day persistence
- Add 4 individual service pages with ServicePageLayout
- Create services index page with card grid
- Add services dropdown to Navbar with hover/timeout behavior
- Build full contact page with form, office card, map, LinkedIn
- Add disclaimer and privacy policy pages
- Create dynamic sitemap.ts and robots.ts
- Add JSON-LD structured data \(Organization, FinancialService, BreadcrumbList\)
- Add page-specific metadata with OpenGraph to all pages
- Configure image optimization \(WebP/AVIF, Sanity CDN, OptimizedImage\)
- Create loading skeleton system \(loading.tsx, Skeleton components\)
- Optimize DM Sans to variable font, add image sizes attributes
- Move all pages under [locale] directory with locale layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace placeholder content with real Blackhorn copy and add site images

- Hero: real overline, headline with "Beyond Simple" gold highlight, subtitle
- TrustBar: 20+ years, 11 private banks, $4Bn+ assets, Type 4 & 9 license
- About: partnership philosophy, holistic investment approach
- Services: expand to 5 cards \(Portfolio Mgmt, Family Office, Deal Sourcing,
  Legacy Planning, Real Estate & Financing\) with 3+2 grid layout
- Insights: Blackhorn-specific article placeholders \(Summit, APAC outlook,
  Family Office\)
- ContactCTA: real phone, email, and Central office address
- Update all service page titles and descriptions to match new names
- Create real-estate-financing service page
- Download and optimize 20 images from Wix site \(team, events, awards, stock\)
- Add image optimization script \(scripts/optimize-images.mjs\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(xargs grep -l "Outstanding CEO\\|Capital CEO\\|LGT Private Banking")
